template_controls: Template record establishes identity, version, status, source location, applicability, and schema-binding reference.
Template selection and loading are implemented separately by M29.3.
Document input schema binding is resolved through M29.4 document input schema source records.
Generation, rendering, lifecycle, and review/approval behavior remain later M29 checkpoints.

template_records.display_name: CSV validation plan starter template record
template_controls: Template record establishes identity, version, status, source location, applicability, and schema-binding reference.
Template selection and loading are implemented separately by M29.3.
Document input schema binding is resolved through M29.4 document input schema source records.
Generation, rendering, lifecycle, and review/approval behavior remain later M29 checkpoints.

library_controls: M29.2 implements controlled template source records.
M29.3 implements deterministic template selection/loading separately from the template source records.
M29.4 binds template records to controlled document input schema source records.
Template records do not generate, render, export, or approve documents.
